revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-195

Quick-flashing light (in sense 1 of 2-5-190) in which the rapid alternations are interrupted at regular intervals by eclipses of long duration. (Fig.43b)

Reference: N.L.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig43.jpg|400px|border]]
